title: buddleja davidii var. nanhoensis
intro: Buddleja davidii var. nanhoensis, also known as the 'Summer Beauty' or 'Nanho Blue', is a compact, deciduous shrub that is a variety of the David's Buddleja plant. It is native to China and is prized for its fragrant, conical flowers in shades of blue and purple. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments. The leaves and flowers of Buddleja davidii var. nanhoensis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
